title: butea peltata
intro: Butea peltata, also known as the Siris tree, is a deciduous tree native to South Asia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Butea peltata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Butea peltata is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as tea, powder, and extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
